seoTitle: Mount Low vs Mount Luke — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Low and Mount Luke. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Low vs Mount Luke: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Low and Mount Luke.
heading: Mount Low vs Mount Luke — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Low, Queensland and Mount Luke, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Low has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Mount Luke (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Low or Mount Luke safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Low has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Mount Luke scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Low scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Luke scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Low or Mount Luke?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Low has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
